meaning: 奥马[英国北爱尔兰西部城镇](蒂龙郡首府)
examples: The planning process for the Galantas mine in Omagh took 11 years.
I'm from Omagh and I miss the countryside so if I can I'll try and hang out in the park with friends.
Then Bertie said my quick response to the Omagh tragedy had galvanized the parties to make decisions quickly that might have taken weeks and months.
Two senior police officers involved in the Omagh bombing investigation have also been honoured.
Caroline McGovern was 13 when Arthur McElhill set the family home in Omagh alight.
